name: cortexmd
description: Second-brain MCP server for Claude Code: memory store/recall with temperature decay, a knowledge graph, code navigation, a dream consolidation engine, and a web dashboard. This plugin wires the MCP server + the automation hooks in one install.

server_url.title: cortexmd server URL
server_url.description: Base URL of your running cortexmd server (the MCP endpoint is <url>/mcp).
